programmes.show_description: Joining Radio 5 Live.
Mark Stephen and Rachel Stewart with stories from the great outdoors.
The stories that matter across Scotland and the world.
Amy Irons and Steven Mill kick-start your Saturday with lots of laughs, great guests and timeless tunes as we look back on the week's news and preview the day's football fixtures.
The most petty and ill-informed football show on radio.
Live commentary of St Johnstone v Queen's Park in the Scottish Championship.
Live commentary of St Johnstone v Queen's Park in the Scottish Championship.
Live commentary of Scotland v Japan from Hampden, as Steve Clarke's side prepare for the World Cup.
For the very best in traditional music, join Gary Innes for Take the Floor. We have not one, but two very special sessions from the archives to share with you.
Roddy Hart with a mix of classic tracks and new discoveries.
Joining Radio 5 Live.
Martin Geissler and the team bring you thoughtful conversation and expert analysis covering the most interesting news stories in Scotland.
An act of worship with Church of Scotland minister Rev Gillean Maclean in Inverness.
Tony's This Spiritual Life guest is space scientist Dame Dr Maggie Aderin. Plus Radio Scotland's Michelle McManus shares her experience of singing for Pope Leo at the Vatican.
News, discussion and interviews from politics and beyond.
The most petty and ill-informed football show on radio.
Live commentary of Glasgow City v Rangers women in the Sky Sports Cup final from Fir Park.
Live commentary of Glasgow City v Rangers women in the Sky Sports Cup final from Fir Park.
Join Gary as he shares your special messages and dedications and plays your favourite Scottish Music requests.
Jamie presents a special edition on the theme of time, featuring music from different times in the calendar year and music with unusual time signatures.
Tyler Ballgame shares his perfect Sunday. Settle in as Roddy Hart plays handpicked tracks, breakthrough artists and fresh sounds to close out the weekend.
Joining Radio 5 Live.
